purpose: Tell the VLM Agent which SimpAI knowledge is user-authored, which is generated scaffolding, and where maintainers should edit it.

rules.manual_required: Knowledge that depends on product intent, private workflow meaning, naming conventions, or safety policy must be written or reviewed by the project owner.
rules.auto_generated: Knowledge that can be derived from current code, canvas snapshots, endpoint shapes, or action schemas can be generated by Codex and reviewed later.
rules.hybrid: Bootstrap text can be generated, but the owner should review it before treating it as official behavior.

areas.title: Skill Ownership And Edit Boundaries
areas.reason: This defines what the owner must explain personally versus what Codex may generate.

areas.title: Infinite Canvas Operations
areas.reason: Node and edge names can be generated from code, but workflow intent needs owner review.

areas.title: Safe VLM Agent Actions
areas.reason: Action safety policy should stay explicit and owner-approved.

areas.title: Image Prompting And Text Encoder Targets
areas.reason: Prompt language and format depend on model family, text encoder, preset naming, and owner-approved workflow conventions.
areas.contract_summary: For VLM Chat image actions, image_prompting currently defines a structured subject_counts contract as {girls,boys,others,total}. Use others for unnamed visible extra subjects and keep SDXL/Danbooru prompt count tags such as multiple_others aligned to that structure.

areas.title: Danbooru Tag Prompting
areas.reason: Danbooru tag-list prompts should be isolated from natural-language image prompting so tag targets do not inherit prose/caption habits.
areas.contract_summary: For SDXL/Danbooru targets, output compact comma-separated English tags, preserve hard locks via prompt_intent, and treat persona traits as subject-scoped.

areas.title: Anima Prompting
areas.reason: Anima uses a hybrid prompt shape: English Danbooru/Anima anchors plus short nltags control sentences, and should not inherit generic Qwen natural-language behavior or pure SDXL tag-only behavior.
areas.contract_summary: For Anima targets, output English Anima-positive prompts with quality/period/rating, subject count, resolved character/series/artist anchors, hard visual tags, and short nltags sentences.

areas.title: Danbooru Prompt Review Gate
areas.reason: Second-pass LLM review changes final generation prompts and must keep intent, tag validity, conflicts, and safety policy owner-approved.

areas.title: Natural Prompt Action Writer
areas.reason: First-pass natural-language generation actions need a compact contract that does not inherit Danbooru draft habits or second-pass review-only instructions.

areas.title: Natural Prompt Adult Branch
areas.reason: Natural-language adult prompt writing and refine need a conditional skill that is loaded only when local adult intent detection unlocks the branch.

areas.title: Natural Prompt Refine Gate
areas.reason: Second-pass refinement changes natural-language generation prompts and must prioritize user intent, target language, and bounded enrichment.

areas.title: Tool Execution Status
areas.reason: Runtime status names come from code, but user-facing interpretation and safety behavior need owner review.

areas.title: Canvas Agent Companion
areas.reason: This defines when the companion may start generation or create an edit workflow after user confirmation.

areas.title: Preset Tool Calling And Naming
areas.reason: Preset aliases, default queues, and generation intent depend on the owner's workflow naming conventions.

areas.title: SimpAI Preset Guide Skill
areas.reason: Preset family recommendations, workflow routing, and owner-specific tool meanings depend on the owner's product knowledge.

areas.title: Runtime Canvas Snapshot
areas.reason: This is generated from the live project state on every chat request.

areas.title: Skill Prompt Injection Pipeline
areas.reason: This code only packages approved docs and runtime context for the model.
